subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God from the Tree of Fire upon the Sacred Spot of Paradise - there is no God but Him, and verily He is the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله فی شجره النار علی بقعه الفردوس الله لا اله الا هو و انه کان بکل شیء علیما
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
